question: Which program received the most applications?
query: SELECT p.program_name, COUNT(a.application_id) AS application_count FROM application a JOIN program p ON p.program_id = a.program_id GROUP BY a.program_id ORDER BY application_count DESC LIMIT 5;

question: What is the average test score per test type?
query: SELECT et.test_type, AVG(ta.score) AS avg_score FROM test_attempt ta JOIN entry_test et ON et.test_id = ta.test_id GROUP BY et.test_type ORDER BY avg_score DESC;

question: List all applicants who were selected or enrolled in BS Computer Science.
query: SELECT ap.full_name FROM applicant ap JOIN application a ON a.applicant_id = ap.applicant_id WHERE a.program_id = 'BSCS' AND a.status IN ('Selected', 'Enrolled');

question: How many students are enrolled in each program?
query: SELECT p.program_name, COUNT(s.student_id) AS student_count FROM student s JOIN program p ON p.program_id = s.program_id GROUP BY s.program_id ORDER BY student_count DESC;

question: What are the top 5 highest test scores of all time?
query: SELECT ap.full_name, et.test_type, ta.score FROM test_attempt ta JOIN applicant ap ON ap.applicant_id = ta.applicant_id JOIN entry_test et ON et.test_id = ta.test_id ORDER BY ta.score DESC LIMIT 5;

question: How many rejected applicants had a best test score above 140?
query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ap.applicant_id) AS rejected_high_scorers FROM applicant ap JOIN application a ON a.applicant_id = ap.applicant_id WHERE a.status = 'Rejected' AND ap.best_test_score > 140;

question: Which school owns the most courses?
query: SELECT sc.school_name, COUNT(c.course_code) AS course_count FROM course c JOIN school sc ON sc.school_id = c.school_id GROUP BY c.school_id ORDER BY course_count DESC LIMIT 5;

question: List all courses offered by SEECS.
query: SELECT c.course_code, c.course_title, c.credit_hours FROM course c WHERE c.school_id = 'SEECS';

question: Which courses are shared across multiple programs?
query: SELECT c.course_code, c.course_title, COUNT(pc.program_id) AS num_programs FROM course c JOIN program_course pc ON pc.course_code = c.course_code GROUP BY c.course_code HAVING num_programs > 1 ORDER BY num_programs DESC;

question: Which faculty member is teaching the most sections in Fall 2025?
query: SELECT f.full_name, COUNT(s.section_id) AS section_count FROM section s JOIN faculty f ON f.faculty_id = s.faculty_id JOIN term t ON t.term_id = s.term_id WHERE t.term_name = 'Fall' AND t.academic_year = 2025 GROUP BY s.faculty_id ORDER BY section_count DESC LIMIT 5;

question: Show the full transcript for student S001.
query: SELECT c.course_code, c.course_title, t.term_name, t.academic_year, e.grade FROM enrollment e JOIN section sec ON sec.section_id = e.section_id JOIN course c ON c.course_code = sec.course_code JOIN term t ON t.term_id = sec.term_id WHERE e.student_id = 'S001' ORDER BY t.start_date;

question: How many students are currently in progress in Database Systems?
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS enrollment_count FROM enrollment e JOIN section sec ON sec.section_id = e.section_id JOIN course c ON c.course_code = sec.course_code WHERE c.course_title = 'Database Systems' AND e.grade IS NULL;

question: Which applicants scored above the average score for the test they took?
query: SELECT ap.full_name, et.test_type, ta.score FROM test_attempt ta JOIN applicant ap ON ap.applicant_id = ta.applicant_id JOIN entry_test et ON et.test_id = ta.test_id WHERE ta.score > (SELECT AVG(ta2.score) FROM test_attempt ta2 WHERE ta2.test_id = ta.test_id);

question: What is the conversion rate from applications to students for each school?
query: SELECT sc.school_name, COUNT(DISTINCT a.application_id) AS total_applications, COUNT(DISTINCT st.student_id) AS converted_students FROM school sc JOIN program p ON p.school_id = sc.school_id LEFT JOIN application a ON a.program_id = p.program_id LEFT JOIN student st ON st.program_id = p.program_id GROUP BY sc.school_id;

question: Which classrooms are hosting more than 2 sections?
query: SELECT cl.building, cl.room_number, COUNT(s.section_id) AS sections_hosted FROM classroom cl LEFT JOIN section s ON s.classroom_id = cl.classroom_id GROUP BY cl.classroom_id HAVING sections_hosted > 2 ORDER BY sections_hosted DESC;

question: Which courses have no sections offered in Fall 2025?
query: SELECT c.course_code, c.course_title FROM course c LEFT JOIN section s ON s.course_code = c.course_code AND s.term_id = (SELECT t.term_id FROM term t WHERE t.term_name = 'Fall' AND t.academic_year = 2025) WHERE s.section_id IS NULL;

question: Which core courses does the BS Computer Science program require in its first two semesters?
query: SELECT c.course_code, c.course_title, pc.recommended_semester FROM program_course pc JOIN course c ON c.course_code = pc.course_code WHERE pc.program_id = 'BSCS' AND pc.is_core = TRUE AND pc.recommended_semester <= 2 ORDER BY pc.recommended_semester;

question: Rank all applicants for BSCS by their best test score.
query: SELECT ap.applicant_id, ap.full_name, ap.best_test_score, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY ap.best_test_score DESC) AS merit_rank FROM applicant ap JOIN application a ON a.applicant_id = ap.applicant_id WHERE a.program_id = 'BSCS';

question: Which students have a failing grade (F) in any course?
query: SELECT s.full_name, c.course_code, c.course_title, e.grade FROM enrollment e JOIN student s ON s.student_id = e.student_id JOIN section sec ON sec.section_id = e.section_id JOIN course c ON c.course_code = sec.course_code WHERE e.grade = 'F' LIMIT 5;

question: Show all applications and their statuses for applicant Ali Hassan.
query: SELECT a.application_id, p.program_name, a.status, a.submission_date FROM application a JOIN applicant ap ON ap.applicant_id = a.applicant_id JOIN program p ON p.program_id = a.program_id WHERE ap.full_name = 'Ali Hassan';

question: List all offers that are still awaiting acceptance.
query: SELECT o.offer_id, ap.full_name, p.program_name, o.issue_date, o.expiry_date, o.status FROM offer o JOIN application a ON a.application_id = o.application_id JOIN applicant ap ON ap.applicant_id = a.applicant_id JOIN program p ON p.program_id = a.program_id WHERE o.status = 'Issued' LIMIT 5;

question: What are the prerequisites for each course in the BSCS curriculum?
query: SELECT c1.course_code AS course, c1.course_title, c2.course_code AS prereq_course, c2.course_title AS prereq_title FROM prerequisite pr JOIN course c1 ON c1.course_code = pr.course_code JOIN course c2 ON c2.course_code = pr.prereq_course_code WHERE pr.course_code IN (SELECT pc.course_code FROM program_course pc WHERE pc.program_id = 'BSCS') LIMIT 5;

question: List applicants who did not apply for the Computer Science program.
query: SELECT ap.applicant_id, ap.full_name FROM applicant ap WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM application a WHERE a.applicant_id = ap.applicant_id AND a.program_id = 'BSCS');

question: Which applicants never submitted any application?
query: SELECT ap.applicant_id, ap.full_name FROM applicant ap LEFT JOIN application a ON a.applicant_id = ap.applicant_id WHERE a.application_id IS NULL;

question: What is the student to faculty ratio per school?
query: SELECT sc.school_name, COUNT(DISTINCT st.student_id) AS students, COUNT(DISTINCT f.faculty_id) AS faculty_count, ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT st.student_id) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT f.faculty_id), 0), 2) AS ratio FROM school sc LEFT JOIN program p ON p.school_id = sc.school_id LEFT JOIN student st ON st.program_id = p.program_id LEFT JOIN faculty f ON f.school_id = sc.school_id GROUP BY sc.school_id, sc.school_name ORDER BY ratio DESC;

question: How many students and faculty does each school have?
query: SELECT sc.school_name, COUNT(DISTINCT st.student_id) AS students, COUNT(DISTINCT f.faculty_id) AS faculty_count FROM school sc LEFT JOIN program p ON p.school_id = sc.school_id LEFT JOIN student st ON st.program_id = p.program_id LEFT JOIN faculty f ON f.school_id = sc.school_id GROUP BY sc.school_id, sc.school_name;

question: Which student has the highest GPA?
query: SELECT s.student_id, s.full_name, p.program_name, s.gpa FROM student s JOIN program p ON p.program_id = s.program_id WHERE s.gpa IS NOT NULL ORDER BY s.gpa DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Which student has the highest GPA in Computer Science?
query: SELECT s.student_id, s.full_name, s.gpa FROM student s JOIN program p ON p.program_id = s.program_id WHERE p.program_name = 'Computer Science' AND s.gpa IS NOT NULL ORDER BY s.gpa DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the average GPA of students by program?
query: SELECT p.program_name, ROUND(AVG(s.gpa), 2) AS avg_gpa FROM student s JOIN program p ON p.program_id = s.program_id WHERE s.gpa IS NOT NULL GROUP BY s.program_id, p.program_name ORDER BY avg_gpa DESC;

question: Which applicants received an offer?
query: SELECT DISTINCT ap.applicant_id, ap.full_name, p.program_name, o.status FROM offer o JOIN application a ON a.application_id = o.application_id JOIN applicant ap ON ap.applicant_id = a.applicant_id JOIN program p ON p.program_id = a.program_id;

question: List all enrolled students with their school.
query: SELECT s.student_id, s.full_name, sc.school_name, p.program_name FROM student s JOIN program p ON p.program_id = s.program_id JOIN school sc ON sc.school_id = p.school_id ORDER BY sc.school_name, s.full_name;

question: Show the full academic profile of each student including their program, school, GPA, current semester, and instructors.
query: SELECT s.student_id, s.full_name AS student_name, p.program_name, p.degree_type, sch.school_name, s.current_semester, s.gpa, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT f.full_name ORDER BY f.full_name SEPARATOR ', ') AS instructors FROM student s JOIN program p ON s.program_id = p.program_id JOIN school sch ON p.school_id = sch.school_id JOIN enrollment e ON s.student_id = e.student_id JOIN section sec ON e.section_id = sec.section_id JOIN faculty f ON sec.faculty_id = f.faculty_id GROUP BY s.student_id, s.full_name, p.program_name, p.degree_type, sch.school_name, s.current_semester, s.gpa ORDER BY (s.gpa IS NULL), s.gpa DESC LIMIT 5;

question: Which applicants have an aggregate score above the average for their applied program?
query: SELECT ap.applicant_id, ap.full_name, app.program_id, p.program_name, app.aggregate_score, prog_avg.avg_score AS program_avg_score, ROUND(app.aggregate_score - prog_avg.avg_score, 2) AS score_above_avg FROM application app JOIN applicant ap ON app.applicant_id = ap.applicant_id JOIN program p ON app.program_id = p.program_id JOIN (SELECT program_id, AVG(aggregate_score) AS avg_score FROM application WHERE aggregate_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY program_id) prog_avg ON app.program_id = prog_avg.program_id WHERE app.aggregate_score > prog_avg.avg_score ORDER BY score_above_avg DESC LIMIT 5;

question: Which schools have more than one Professor-level faculty member?
query: SELECT sch.school_id, sch.school_name, COUNT(f.faculty_id) AS professor_count, GROUP_CONCAT(f.full_name ORDER BY f.full_name SEPARATOR ', ') AS professor_names FROM school sch JOIN faculty f ON sch.school_id = f.school_id WHERE f.designation = 'Professor' GROUP BY sch.school_id, sch.school_name HAVING COUNT(f.faculty_id) > 1 ORDER BY professor_count DESC;

question: Show the admission funnel for each program including total applications, selections, rejections, offers issued, enrolled students, and seat fill percentage.
query: SELECT p.program_id, p.program_name, p.degree_type, sch.abbreviation AS school, COUNT(app.application_id) AS total_applications, SUM(app.status = 'Selected') AS selected, SUM(app.status = 'Waitlisted') AS waitlisted, SUM(app.status = 'Rejected') AS rejected, COUNT(o.offer_id) AS offers_issued, COUNT(st.student_id) AS enrolled_students, p.total_seats, ROUND(COUNT(st.student_id) / p.total_seats * 100, 1) AS seat_fill_pct FROM program p JOIN school sch ON p.school_id = sch.school_id LEFT JOIN application app ON p.program_id = app.program_id LEFT JOIN offer o ON app.application_id = o.application_id LEFT JOIN student st ON p.program_id = st.program_id GROUP BY p.program_id, p.program_name, p.degree_type, sch.abbreviation, p.total_seats ORDER BY total_applications DESC LIMIT 5;

question: Which students are currently enrolled in more active courses than the average student?
query: SELECT s.student_id, s.full_name, s.current_semester, s.gpa, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrollment e2 JOIN section sec2 ON e2.section_id = sec2.section_id WHERE e2.student_id = s.student_id AND e2.grade IS NULL) AS active_courses FROM student s WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrollment e2 JOIN section sec2 ON e2.section_id = sec2.section_id WHERE e2.student_id = s.student_id AND e2.grade IS NULL) > (SELECT AVG(course_load) FROM (SELECT student_id, COUNT(*) AS course_load FROM enrollment e3 JOIN section sec3 ON e3.section_id = sec3.section_id WHERE e3.grade IS NULL GROUP BY e3.student_id) loads) ORDER BY active_courses DESC;

question: How many sections and distinct courses did each faculty member teach per term, and what was their total classroom seat capacity?
query: SELECT f.faculty_id, f.full_name AS faculty_name, f.designation, sch.abbreviation AS school, CONCAT(t.term_name, ' ', t.academic_year) AS term_label, COUNT(sec.section_id) AS sections_taught, COUNT(DISTINCT sec.course_code) AS distinct_courses, SUM(cl.capacity) AS total_seat_capacity FROM faculty f JOIN school sch ON f.school_id = sch.school_id JOIN section sec ON f.faculty_id = sec.faculty_id JOIN term t ON sec.term_id = t.term_id JOIN classroom cl ON sec.classroom_id = cl.classroom_id GROUP BY f.faculty_id, f.full_name, f.designation, sch.abbreviation, t.term_id, t.term_name, t.academic_year ORDER BY term_label, sections_taught DESC LIMIT 5;

question: Which courses in the catalog have never had any student enrollment?
query: SELECT c.course_code, c.course_title, c.course_type, c.credit_hours, sch.school_name FROM course c JOIN school sch ON c.school_id = sch.school_id WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM section sec JOIN enrollment e ON sec.section_id = e.section_id WHERE sec.course_code = c.course_code) ORDER BY sch.school_name, c.course_code LIMIT 5;

question: Rank students by their final grade within each course section.
query: SELECT sec.section_id, c.course_title, CONCAT(t.term_name, ' ', t.academic_year) AS term_label, s.student_id, s.full_name AS student_name, e.grade, e.attendance_percentage, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY e.section_id ORDER BY FIELD(e.grade,'A','A-','B+','B','B-','C+','C','C-','D+','D','F')) AS grade_rank FROM enrollment e JOIN student s ON e.student_id = s.student_id JOIN section sec ON e.section_id = sec.section_id JOIN course c ON sec.course_code = c.course_code JOIN term t ON sec.term_id = t.term_id WHERE e.grade IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sec.section_id, grade_rank LIMIT 5;

question: Who scored the highest on each NET test type, and what programs did they apply to?
query: WITH ranked_attempts AS (SELECT ta.applicant_id, et.test_type, ta.score AS test_score, ap.full_name, ap.high_school_score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY et.test_type ORDER BY ta.score DESC) AS rnk FROM test_attempt ta JOIN entry_test et ON ta.test_id = et.test_id JOIN applicant ap ON ta.applicant_id = ap.applicant_id) SELECT ra.test_type, ra.full_name AS top_scorer, ra.test_score, ra.high_school_score, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(app.program_id, ' (', app.status, ')') ORDER BY app.program_id SEPARATOR ', ') AS applications FROM ranked_attempts ra LEFT JOIN application app ON ra.applicant_id = app.applicant_id WHERE ra.rnk = 1 GROUP BY ra.test_type, ra.full_name, ra.test_score, ra.high_school_score ORDER BY ra.test_score DESC;

question: Which programs have an average applicant aggregate score above the overall average, and which term saw the most applicants for each?
query: SELECT p.program_id, p.program_name, p.degree_type, sch.abbreviation AS school, COUNT(app.application_id) AS total_applicants, ROUND(AVG(app.aggregate_score), 2) AS avg_aggregate, ROUND(AVG(app.aggregate_score) - (SELECT AVG(aggregate_score) FROM application WHERE aggregate_score IS NOT NULL), 2) AS vs_overall_avg, (SELECT t2.term_name FROM application app2 JOIN term t2 ON app2.term_id = t2.term_id WHERE app2.program_id = p.program_id AND app2.aggregate_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY app2.term_id, t2.term_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1) AS busiest_term FROM program p JOIN school sch ON p.school_id = sch.school_id JOIN application app ON p.program_id = app.program_id WHERE app.aggregate_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY p.program_id, p.program_name, p.degree_type, sch.abbreviation HAVING AVG(app.aggregate_score) > (SELECT AVG(aggregate_score) FROM application WHERE aggregate_score IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY avg_aggregate DESC LIMIT 5;

question: What is the utilisation status of each classroom section — empty, under-utilised, optimal, or over-capacity?
query: SELECT sec.section_id, c.course_title, cl.building, cl.room_number, cl.capacity AS room_capacity, COUNT(e.student_id) AS enrolled_count, ROUND(COUNT(e.student_id) / cl.capacity * 100, 1) AS utilisation_pct, CASE WHEN COUNT(e.student_id) = 0 THEN 'Empty' WHEN COUNT(e.student_id) / cl.capacity < 0.60 THEN 'Under-utilised' WHEN COUNT(e.student_id) / cl.capacity BETWEEN 0.60 AND 1.00 THEN 'Optimal' ELSE 'Over-capacity' END AS utilisation_status, f.full_name AS instructor, CONCAT(t.term_name, ' ', t.academic_year) AS term_label FROM section sec JOIN course c ON sec.course_code = c.course_code JOIN classroom cl ON sec.classroom_id = cl.classroom_id JOIN faculty f ON sec.faculty_id = f.faculty_id JOIN term t ON sec.term_id = t.term_id LEFT JOIN enrollment e ON sec.section_id = e.section_id GROUP BY sec.section_id, c.course_title, cl.building, cl.room_number, cl.capacity, f.full_name, t.term_name, t.academic_year ORDER BY utilisation_pct DESC LIMIT 5;

question: Show the full prerequisite dependency chain for all courses, including indirect prerequisites.
query: WITH RECURSIVE prereq_tree AS (SELECT p.course_code, p.prereq_course_code, 1 AS depth, CAST(p.prereq_course_code AS CHAR(200)) AS chain FROM prerequisite p UNION ALL SELECT pt.course_code, p2.prereq_course_code, pt.depth + 1, CONCAT(p2.prereq_course_code, ' -> ', pt.chain) FROM prereq_tree pt JOIN prerequisite p2 ON pt.prereq_course_code = p2.course_code WHERE pt.depth < 4) SELECT pt.course_code, c1.course_title, pt.prereq_course_code, c2.course_title AS prereq_title, pt.depth, pt.chain AS full_prerequisite_chain FROM prereq_tree pt JOIN course c1 ON pt.course_code = c1.course_code JOIN course c2 ON pt.prereq_course_code = c2.course_code ORDER BY pt.course_code, pt.depth LIMIT 5;

question: Which applicants applied to multiple programs and were selected in at least one?
query: SELECT ap.applicant_id, ap.full_name, ap.high_school_board, ap.best_test_score, COUNT(app.application_id) AS total_applications, SUM(app.status = 'Selected') AS selected_count, SUM(app.status = 'Rejected') AS rejected_count, SUM(app.status = 'Waitlisted') AS waitlisted_count, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(app.program_id, ': ', app.status) ORDER BY app.program_id SEPARATOR ' | ') AS application_summary FROM applicant ap JOIN application app ON ap.applicant_id = app.applicant_id GROUP BY ap.applicant_id, ap.full_name, ap.high_school_board, ap.best_test_score HAVING COUNT(app.application_id) > 1 AND SUM(app.status = 'Selected') >= 1 ORDER BY selected_count DESC, total_applications DESC LIMIT 5;
